title: Remove Consecutive Repeated Characters from a String

statement.markdown:
Given a string of lowercase English letters, remove all pairs of consecutive repeated characters. For example, if the input string is 'aabbc', after the removal process, the string should become 'ab'.

Your task is to implement a function that takes a string of lowercase English letters as input and returns the resulting string after removing all pairs of consecutive repeated characters.
statement.inputFormat: A string of lowercase English letters.
statement.outputFormat: The resulting string after removing all pairs of consecutive repeated characters.
statement.notes: Do not modify the original string. Use a new data structure to store the result.

hints.text: Think about how to handle repeated characters and their consecutive occurrences.

editorial.title: Optimal Solution
editorial.intuition: The intuition is to use two pointers to traverse the input string and store the result in a new data structure.
editorial.optimalSolution: The optimal solution is to use two pointers to traverse the input string. If a repeated character is found, remove the duplicate character by incrementing the second pointer.
